name: freecodereorganizer
description: Reorganize C#/Razor members into the FreeCRM house style, and run .editorconfig cleanup (dotnet format) — a single file or the whole workspace. Shares the same engine as the Visual Studio extension.

freecodereorganizer.sortAlphabetically.description: Sort members alphabetically within each kind group (properties, indexers and methods interleave into one alphabetical list).

freecodereorganizer.ignoreLeadingUndersc.description: When comparing names, ignore a single leading underscore so _connectionString sorts as "connectionString".

freecodereorganizer.groupByVisibility.description: Group members by accessibility (public first) before sorting. Off by default — FreeCRM interleaves public/private in pure alphabetical order.

freecodereorganizer.staticMembersFirst.description: Within a kind group, place static members before instance members. Off by default to match FreeCRM.

freecodereorganizer.collapseWrappedParam.description: Reformat already-wrapped parameter lists into the FreeCRM hand style ('(' on its own line, params one level deeper, ')' glued to the body '{' as "){"), collapsing back to one line if it fits within Max line width.

freecodereorganizer.indentWrappedRazorAt.description: Double-tab already-wrapped Razor/Blazor element attributes (element indent + two levels). Only leading whitespace inside the start tag changes, so rendered output is preserved.

freecodereorganizer.respectRegions.description: Leave types whose only directives are #region / #endregion untouched. Turn off to allow reordering across region boundaries.

freecodereorganizer.maxPercentReordered.description: If sorting would move more than this percent of a type's sortable members, the type is treated as deliberately ordered by purpose and left untouched. Set 100 to always sort.

freecodereorganizer.maxLineWidth.description: Width at/under which an already-wrapped parameter list or Razor start tag collapses back onto a single line. Wider ones stay wrapped. Never force-wraps a single line.

freecodereorganizer.runCleanupBeforeReor.description: Run the .editorconfig cleanup (dotnet format) before reorganizing, so editorconfig formatting is applied first and the house style is layered on top. Requires the .NET SDK.

freecodereorganizer.fullCleanup.description: Use full 'dotnet format' (also removes/sorts usings and applies code-style + analyzer fixes; needs a project/solution and is slower) instead of whitespace-only cleanup.

freecodereorganizer.excludeReorganize.description: Paths/globs whose members are NEVER reordered (e.g. EF models that mirror database column order). They are still eligible for cleanup. A plain word matches any path containing it; use * and ** for globs. Example: CRM.EFModels

freecodereorganizer.excludeCleanup.description: Paths/globs that dotnet format and the house-style formatting skip entirely. A plain word matches any path containing it; use * and ** for globs.

freecodereorganizer.dotnetPath.description: Path to the 'dotnet' executable used to run the engine and dotnet format. Change only if dotnet is not on your PATH.
